subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath revealed that which He desired and sent down from the heaven of bounty that which attracteth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر ما اراد و انزل من سماء العطاء ما انجذب
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @prayer for nearness to God
